description: Local, token-free MCP server that converts any attachment to Markdown and digests it into a deterministic, model-free knowledge-graph memory for any AI assistant — Claude, Gemini, Cursor, VS Code, Windsurf, ChatGPT's Codex and Grok. No LLM, no Ollama, no embedding model, no GPU, no network — runs 100% on-device, byte-identical output, ~0 context tokens to build or recall. Safe archive unpacking, optional Tesseract OCR, legacy Bengali→Unicode (incl. vetted রম্ন→রু repair), BM25 recall, PII suppression. 8 MCP tools.
